models.name: Qwen3 1.7B (Q4_K_M)
models.description: Qwen3 1.7B GGUF Q4_K_M (~1.1 GB). Ultra-fast inference, runs on any Mac. Thinking + non-thinking mode.

models.name: Qwen3 1.7B (Q8)
models.description: Qwen3 1.7B GGUF Q8 (~2.1 GB). Near-original quality in a tiny footprint. Great for 8 GB Macs.

models.name: Qwen3 4B (Q4_K_M)
models.description: Qwen3 4B GGUF Q4_K_M (~2.3 GB). Excellent speed and quality balance on 8 GB+ Macs.

models.name: Qwen3 4B (Q8)
models.description: Qwen3 4B GGUF Q8 (~4.3 GB). High-quality chat, coding, and reasoning on 8 GB Macs.

models.name: Qwen3 8B (Q4_K_M)
models.description: Qwen3 8B GGUF Q4_K_M (~4.9 GB). Excellent quality-to-size ratio. Recommended for 16 GB Macs.

models.name: Qwen3 8B (Q8)
models.description: Qwen3 8B GGUF Q8 (~9 GB). Near-original quality for chat, coding, and complex reasoning.

models.name: Qwen3 14B (Q4_K_M)
models.description: Qwen3 14B GGUF Q4_K_M (~8.5 GB). Strong reasoning and coding. Great for 16 GB Macs.

models.name: Qwen3 14B (Q8)
models.description: Qwen3 14B GGUF Q8 (~15.7 GB). High-fidelity reasoning and multilingual chat. Requires 32 GB Mac.

models.name: Qwen3 32B (Q4_K_M)
models.description: Qwen3 32B GGUF Q4_K_M (~19.5 GB). Top-tier open-source LLM with deep reasoning. Best for 32 GB Macs.

models.name: Qwen3 32B (Q8)
models.description: Qwen3 32B GGUF Q8 (~36 GB). Near-original precision for frontier-level LLM tasks. Requires 64 GB Mac.

models.name: Qwen3.5 9B (Q4_K_M)
models.description: Qwen3.5 9B GGUF Q4_K_M (~5.5 GB). Hybrid DeltaNet + Gated Attention — O(1) memory for 75% of layers.

models.name: Qwen3.5 9B (Q8)
models.description: Qwen3.5 9B GGUF Q8 (~10.5 GB). High-fidelity hybrid architecture model for chat and reasoning.

models.name: Qwen3.5 27B (Q4_K_M)
models.description: Qwen3.5 27B GGUF Q4_K_M (~16.5 GB). Strong 27B hybrid model. Best balance for 32+ GB Macs.

models.name: Qwen3.5 27B (Q8)
models.description: Qwen3.5 27B GGUF Q8 (~31 GB). Near-original quality hybrid model. Requires 64 GB Mac.

models.name: Qwen3.5 35B-A3B (Q4_K_M)
models.description: Qwen3.5 35B-A3B MoE GGUF Q4_K_M (~21 GB). 35B total / 3B active. Efficient MoE reasoning model.

models.name: Qwen3.5 35B-A3B (Q8)
models.description: Qwen3.5 35B-A3B MoE GGUF Q8 (~38 GB). Near-original quality large MoE model. Requires 64 GB Mac.

models.name: GLM-4.7-Flash (Q4_K_M)
models.description: Zhipu GLM-4.7-Flash 30B-A3B MoE GGUF Q4_K_M (~18.3 GB). Beats Qwen3-30B-A3B on AIME and SWE-bench.

models.name: GLM-4.7-Flash (Q8)
models.description: Zhipu GLM-4.7-Flash 30B-A3B MoE GGUF Q8 (~31.8 GB). Highest quality GLM Flash. Requires 64 GB Mac.

models.name: Moxin-7B VLM
models.description: Vision-language model: DINOv2 + SigLIP vision encoder + Mistral-7B. Chat with images at 30 tok/s.

models.name: Qwen3-VL 4B
models.description: Qwen3 Vision-Language model, 4B parameters. Chat with images, documents, and screenshots. Runs on 8 GB Macs.

models.name: Qwen3-VL 8B
models.description: Qwen3 Vision-Language model, 8B parameters. Strong image understanding and document analysis. Best balance for 16 GB Macs.

models.name: Qwen3-VL 30B
models.description: Qwen3 Vision-Language MoE model, 30B-A3B parameters. Frontier-level vision understanding. Requires 64+ GB Mac.

models.name: Qwen3-TTS (Preset Voices)
models.description: Qwen3-TTS 1.7B text-to-speech with 9 preset speakers across 12 languages. ~2.3x realtime on Apple Silicon.

models.name: Qwen3-TTS (Voice Cloning)
models.description: Qwen3-TTS 1.7B Base variant with zero-shot voice cloning via ECAPA-TDNN speaker embedding.

models.name: Qwen3-ASR 1.7B (8-bit MLX)
models.description: Qwen3-ASR 1.7B encoder-decoder speech recognition. 30+ languages, ~30x realtime on Apple Silicon.

models.name: Wan2.2 5B (Q4_K_M)
models.description: Wan2.2 5B text-to-video diffusion model, Q4_K_M GGUF (~5 GB). Generate high-quality videos from text prompts on Apple Silicon.

models.name: Wan2.2 5B (Q8)
models.description: Wan2.2 5B text-to-video diffusion model, Q8 GGUF (~9 GB). Higher fidelity video generation on 16+ GB Apple Silicon.

models.name: FLUX.2-klein 4B (8-bit MLX)
models.description: FLUX.2-klein 4B image generation, 8-bit MLX quantized (~12 GB). Fast text-to-image on Apple Silicon.

models.name: Qwen-Image-2512 (4-bit MLX)
models.description: Qwen-Image-2512 text-to-image generation, 4-bit MLX quantized. High quality image generation on Apple Silicon.

models.name: Qwen-Image-Edit-2511 (Q4_K_M)
models.description: Qwen-Image-Edit-2511 diffusion-based image editing. Supply a reference image + text instruction to produce an edited image. Q4_K_M GGUF, ~12 GB peak memory.

models.name: Qwen-Image-2512 (Q4_K_M GGUF)
models.description: Qwen-Image-2512 text-to-image generation via GGUF. High quality images from text prompts on Apple Silicon. Q4_K_M quantized, ~24 GB peak for 1024x1024.

models.name: FLUX.2-klein 4B (Q4_0 GGUF)
models.description: FLUX.2-klein 4B text-to-image via GGUF. Ultra-fast 4-step generation (~8s for 512x512). Uses Qwen3-4B as text encoder.

models.name: Cosmos Predict2 14B T2I (Q4_K_M)
models.description: Cosmos Predict2 14B text-to-image via GGUF. High-quality 1360x768 images from NVIDIA's Cosmos foundation model. Uses T5-XXL text encoder.
